answers.label: I have a Master's degree or higher
Fixing, repairing, and maintaining things with my hands
Analytical — I like logic, data, and figuring out how things work

milestones.title: Degree / Formal Education
milestones.description: Enroll in and complete a bachelor's degree relevant to sports nutritionist (focus on coursework covering sports nutrition science and physiology, and macro and micronutrient periodisation)

resources.title: Faculty of Home Economics - Helwan University (Department of Nutrition and Food Science)
Faculty of Agriculture - Cairo University (Department of Food Science and Technology)
Faculty of Agriculture - Alexandria University (Department of Food Science and Technology)
National Nutrition Institute (NNI) - Ministry of Health and Population
Faculty of Agriculture - Ain Shams University (Department of Food Science and Technology)

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in sports nutrition science and physiology, macro and micronutrient periodisation, and supplement safety and anti-doping regulations (WADA) — these are the essential building blocks for a sports nutritionist

resources.title: International Society of Sports Nutrition (ISSN) Official Website

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in body composition assessment, hydration strategy, and recovery nutrition protocols, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Udemy: Sports Nutrition & Related Skills Courses
YouTube: Sports Nutrition, Hydration, & Recovery Tutorials

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing real-world projects, practical exercises, or volunteer/freelance work related to sports nutritionist — focus on applying sports nutrition science and physiology, and macro and micronutrient periodisation in realistic scenarios

resources.title: American Fitness Network (AFN) Egypt - Sports Nutrition Specialist

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio showcasing your best work, completed projects, certifications, and any measurable achievements related to sports nutritionist

resources.title: Udemy Search: Sports Nutrition Certifications & Courses
YouTube Search: Sports Nutrition Education & Tutorials

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your sports nutritionist skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Rehab Academy: Sports Nutrition Diploma & Courses

milestones.title: Job Application
milestones.description: Apply for sports nutritionist positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

resources.title: sports nutritionist jobs on Indeed Egypt

milestones.title: Foundation & Core Skills

Enroll in and complete a bachelor's degree relevant to sports nutritionist (focus on coursework covering sports nutrition science and physiology, and macro and micronutrient periodisation)

Then: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in sports nutrition science and physiology, macro and micronutrient periodisation, and supplement safety and anti-doping regulations (WADA) — these are the essential building blocks for a sports nutritionist
